step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the summary provided by Agent2. Vulcanization indeed pertains to irreversible chemical modifications such as cross-linking or polymerization, which characterize its use primarily in zinc oxide-eugenol cements due to their characteristic hardening over time without returning to original properties.
raw_response:
I agree with the summary provided by Agent2. Vulcanization indeed pertains to irreversible chemical modifications such as cross-linking or polymerization, which characterize its use primarily in zinc oxide-eugenol cements due to their characteristic hardening over time without returning to original properties.

Answer: D Anew point to support this would be how other materials listed do not undergo similar fundamental structural changes during application; they either set physically or remain stable reversibly.
